holdings.infoBox: EASG is an equity ETF with a total of 375 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 6.26%, HSBC Holdings at 2.74%, Novartis AG at 2.38%, AstraZeneca at 2.30%, and Tokyo Electron at 1.74%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers MSCI EAFE Selection Equity ETF (EASG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE ESG Leaders index, a principles-based, market-cap-weighted index of stocks from developed markets outside of the US and Canada. EASG was launched on Sep 6, 2018 and is issued by Xtrackers.
